# Dominion

<!-- source: PDF p.82 -->

## Maximum dominion

<!-- p.83 -->

## Enemy dominion

<!-- p.83 -->

## Increasing your dominion

<!-- p.83 -->

### Dominion over water

<!-- p.83 -->

### Appointing a prophet

<!-- p.83 -->

### Mictlan

<!-- p.84 -->

### Blood Sacrifices

<!-- p.84 -->

### Dominion spread

<!-- p.84 -->

### Preaching the Word of God

<!-- p.84 -->

#### Inquisitor bonus

<!-- p.85 -->

#### Heretics

<!-- p.85 -->

## Dominion effects

<!-- p.85 -->

### Dominion scales

<!-- p.85 -->

#### Effects of Dominion Scales

<!-- p.85 -->

#### Heat/Cold scale variability

<!-- p.86 -->

#### Extreme heat/cold scales

<!-- p.86 -->

### Pretender and prophet hit points

<!-- p.86 -->

## Dominion victory

<!-- p.87 -->

### Dominion strategy

<!-- p.87 -->

## Special Dominions

<!-- p.87 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
